name: deskpilot
description: Local desktop control panel for browser session management and workflow switching.

scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "npm:dev" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && npm run build:electron && vite build
scripts.package:prototype: npm run build && node scripts/package-prototype.mjs development
scripts.package:productive: npm run build && node scripts/package-prototype.mjs productive
scripts.test:prototype: npm run package:prototype && node scripts/prototype-launcher-smoke.mjs && npm run package:productive && npm run test:productive-launcher && electron scripts/prototype-renderer-smoke-app && npm run test:extension
